Transcrição Completa: 13 I Saw a Negative Review I'm Afraid It'll Happen to me
[00:00] I saw a negative review of your business online and I'm afraid that could happen to me.
[00:06] First of all, if you're watching this right now, you're likely one of my clients or once again, you're in the sales team of one of my clients.
[00:14] I want to be very direct in saying this. You as a business likely operate with a very high level of integrity and ethics uh to even be a client of ours in the first place to be clear.
[00:25] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "High Integrity Business Assumption"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Representação de negócios éticos e íntegros, padrões elevados de conduta, tratamento exemplar de clientes
[00:27] So, I'm going to give you the benefit of the doubt that you treat your clients very well. That you give them the greatest experiences possible.
[00:35] And I'm going to talk through this as if maybe that person is a Karen and they didn't get their way or they were, you know, over the top with their ask and maybe you even refunded the person and now they're just trying to trash you online.
[00:47] I'm going to assume once again that you're a great business operator and that you're not actually out there burning people in terms of how I how I encourage you to retort. Okay.
[00:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Negative Review Response Strategy"
NÚMEROS: Four dozen testimonials mentioned
VISUAL: Script de resposta para avaliação negativa, comparação entre uma review negativa vs múltiplas positivas
[01:00] So, hey, I saw a negative review about your business online and I'm you know, I'm afraid that's going to happen to me.
[01:07] It's very fair client. Have you seen all the good reviews about us? Have you you know, just to be clear, I actually I know the review you're talking about.
[01:16] That was this lady and uh it was a very unfortunate situation. She signed up with us. She had the wrong expectations.
[01:24] Uh she wanted a lot of communication that we just, you know, simply couldn't provide to her. We ended up refunding the lady, but uh unfortunately she still went online and she trusted us about the experience and um you know she just kind of tried to tarnish our name because she was very upset with us that we couldn't get her the result that she wanted.
[01:43] So as unfortunate as that is, we have a little over four dozen different testimonials about our business online.
[01:50] We've got a lot of credible people that'll vouch for us and I'd be happy to show you all that data right now on this Zoom call if you don't mind.
[01:58] You know, have you looked at those yet?
[02:01] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Positive Testimonial Counter-Attack"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Overwhelming positive testimonials vs single negative review, credible people vouching, live demonstration on Zoom
[02:03] And I just want to kind of overcome that by showing them all the positive experiences people have had with our business in comparison because at the end of the day, you will get an occasional crazy or you will just occasionally fail and you'll have a bad review about your business online and sometimes that will hold people back.
[02:19] But try to overcome it with all the good that the business has done in comparison. And make sure that if you get that objection that you hammer it with positive testimonials and positive reviews.
[02:30] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Reputation Cleanup Requirements"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Processo de limpeza de reputação online, SEO para empurrar reviews negativas, primeira página de resultados limpa
[02:32] If you so happen to have fucked up a lot in the past and you do have a shitload of bad reputation, uh, you know, testimonials, you have terrible reviews about yourself online, then yeah, you got to clean it up.
[02:43] Obviously, you got to do a better job at actually delivering results for people. You got to do a better job at controlling your online presence.
[02:51] You want to do a lot of search engine optimization. You want to get all those negative reviews pressed down off that first page in the instance that you do have them.
[03:00] And remember, that really just comes with operating as an ethical and integrous and, you know, high morale individual.
[03:07] That way you don't have these types of issues where there are actual issues that hold the business back.
[03:13] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Extreme Reputation Damage Case Study"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Caso extremo de dano reputacional, múltiplas plataformas de review atacadas, necessidade de rebranding completo
[03:15] We've had one client in the past and we didn't know this when we took them on. Um, you know, it wasn't really happening when we took them on.
[03:23] They scaled up extremely aggressively. Like they made a whole bunch of money really fast and their operations team really fucked them.
[03:31] He actually had a business partner that was responsible for the operations and the business partner was not doing a thing to deliver results for the people who were signing up with that business.
[03:41] All those clients and customers got burned. All those clients and customers then went online, went on ripoff report, uh trashed them on every public place you could imagine.
[03:52] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Multi-Platform Review Destruction"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Ataques coordenados em Trust Pilot, Google Reviews, Facebook Reviews, Yelp, Ripoff Report, destruição sistemática da reputação
[03:54] Trust Pilot, uh Google search reviews, their Facebook reviews, you know, they even created a Yelp for the business and then trashed the business on Yelp.
[04:03] Every ad that that business ever ran would have those people. I mean, those people were so adamant about destroying those businesses that that business had to rebrand under a different business name.
[04:14] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Banking System Alert Level Damage"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Bancos alertando clientes contra transferências, nível extremo de dano reputacional, sistema financeiro envolvido
[04:16] It even got to the point where new customers who were willing to work with the business were told by their banks when they were going to wire that, hey, like don't wire to this business. We think they're a scam.
[04:27] That's how far I can go in the instance that you actually do a terrible job at delivering for your clients.
[04:33] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Recovery and Redemption Strategy"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Processo de recuperação, entrega excepcional para clientes queimados, esforço above-and-beyond para reconstruir reputação
[04:35] But to be fair, that same client has done an incredible job at turning the delivery around. They do a great job now at actually getting results for people.
[04:44] And more importantly, everybody that they previously burned, they did an above average job at trying to deliver great results for after they were already burned and after they had already got their money back.
[04:56] You got to do a lot to overcome it in the instance that that happens to you.
